history.en: The Nebelung may have a reserved nature, but she loves to play (being especially fond of retrieving) and enjoys jumping or climbing to high places where she can study people and situations at her leisure before making up her mind about whether she wants to get involved.
history.zh: 尼伯龙猫可能性格内敛，但它喜欢玩耍（特别喜欢捡东西），并且喜欢跳到高处，在那里它可以悠闲地观察人和情况，然后决定是否要参与其中。

overview.en: The Nebelung is a rare, elegant long-haired cat known for its gentle, quiet, and shy temperament. Bred to resemble a long-haired Russian Blue, this breed features a shimmering blue coat, green eyes, and a graceful, medium-sized build. Nebelungs are deeply loyal to their families but reserved with strangers, often taking time to warm up. They are playful and intelligent, with a particular fondness for retrieving toys and climbing to high perches to observe their surroundings. Despite their initial shyness, they form strong bonds with their owners and enjoy quiet, interactive play. Their calm, serene nature makes them ideal companions for peaceful households. They are not demanding or overly vocal, but they thrive on routine and gentle attention. Understanding their need for patience and respect is key to building a trusting relationship with this sensitive breed.
overview.zh: 内贝隆猫是一种稀有、优雅的长毛猫，以其温和、安静和害羞的气质而闻名。这种猫被培育成类似长毛俄罗斯蓝猫，拥有闪亮的蓝色被毛、绿色眼睛和优雅的中等体型。内贝隆猫对家人极其忠诚，但对陌生人则保持矜持，往往需要时间才能亲近。它们聪明且爱玩耍，特别喜欢寻回玩具和爬到高处观察周围环境。尽管最初害羞，但它们会与主人建立深厚的情感纽带，并享受安静、互动的游戏。其平静安详的性格使其成为宁静家庭的理想伴侣。它们不苛求也不过度吵闹，但需要规律的生活和温柔的关注。理解它们对耐心和尊重的需求，是与这种敏感品种建立信任关系的关键。

care.en: Daily care for a Nebelung includes moderate grooming due to its semi-long, fine coat. Brush at least 2-3 times per week to prevent mats and reduce shedding; increase to daily during seasonal molts. This breed is moderately active and needs about 20-30 minutes of interactive play daily, such as fetch or puzzle toys, to satisfy its playful and intelligent nature. Provide cat trees or high shelves for climbing and observation. Nail trimming every 2 weeks, ear cleaning monthly, and regular dental care (brushing teeth 2-3 times per week) are recommended. Annual veterinary check-ups are essential, along with routine vaccinations and parasite prevention. Because Nebelungs are sensitive, keep their environment calm and predictable. They thrive on routine, so feeding, play, and rest times should be consistent. Avoid sudden changes to reduce stress.
care.zh: 内贝隆猫的日常护理包括适度的毛发梳理。由于其半长毛、细腻的被毛，建议每周至少梳理2-3次，以防打结和减少掉毛；换毛季节建议每日梳理。这种猫活动量中等，每天需要20-30分钟的互动游戏，如寻回游戏或益智玩具，以满足其爱玩和聪明的天性。提供猫爬架或高架子供其攀爬和观察。建议每两周修剪指甲，每月清洁耳朵，并定期进行牙齿护理（每周刷牙2-3次）。每年进行一次兽医体检至关重要，同时进行常规疫苗接种和寄生虫预防。由于内贝隆猫较为敏感，应保持其生活环境安静且可预测。它们喜欢规律的生活，因此喂食、玩耍和休息时间应保持一致，避免突然的变化以减少压力。

training.en: Training a Nebelung requires patience, positive reinforcement, and a gentle approach. This breed is intelligent but can be shy and cautious, so never use harsh corrections. Use treats, praise, and clicker training to teach basic commands like sit, stay, and come. Nebelungs often enjoy retrieving, so you can incorporate fetch into training sessions to make learning fun. Early socialization is crucial: expose your kitten gradually to new people, sounds, and experiences in a controlled, positive way to build confidence. Because they are sensitive, keep training sessions short (5-10 minutes) and end on a positive note. Litter box training is usually straightforward due to their clean nature. Puzzle toys and trick training can engage their sharp minds. Consistency and repetition are key; avoid rushing them. Over time, they will learn eagerly and bond more deeply with you through these positive interactions.
training.zh: 训练内贝隆猫需要耐心、积极强化和温和的方法。这种猫聪明但害羞谨慎，因此绝不可使用严厉的纠正。利用零食、表扬和响片训练来教授基本指令，如“坐下”、“等待”和“过来”。内贝隆猫喜欢寻回游戏，因此可以将寻回融入训练中，让学习变得有趣。早期社会化至关重要：以可控、积极的方式让幼猫逐渐接触新的人、声音和经历，以建立自信。由于它们敏感，训练时间应简短（5-10分钟），并在积极的氛围中结束。由于其爱干净的天性，猫砂盆训练通常很容易。益智玩具和技巧训练可以激发其敏锐的思维。一致性和重复是关键；不要催促它们。随着时间的推移，它们会通过这些积极的互动热切学习，并与您建立更深的纽带。

diet.en: Feed your Nebelung a high-quality, protein-rich diet appropriate for its life stage (kitten, adult, senior). Both wet and dry food can be offered, with wet food providing additional hydration. Because this breed is moderately active, monitor portions to prevent obesity; follow feeding guidelines on the food package and adjust based on your cat's activity level and body condition. Divide daily food into 2-3 meals to maintain steady energy. Fresh, clean water should always be available; consider a pet water fountain to encourage drinking. Nebelungs have sensitive stomachs, so introduce new foods gradually over 7-10 days. Avoid excessive treats and table scraps. Omega-3 and Omega-6 fatty acids (from fish oil or high-quality cat food) can help maintain their luxurious coat. Consult your veterinarian for specific dietary recommendations, especially if your cat has any health issues.
diet.zh: 为您的内贝隆猫提供适合其生命阶段（幼猫、成猫、老年猫）的高质量、富含蛋白质的饮食。可以提供湿粮和干粮，其中湿粮有助于补充水分。由于该品种活动量中等，应注意控制食量以防肥胖；遵循食品包装上的喂食指南，并根据猫的活动水平和身体状况进行调整。将每日食物分成2-3餐，以维持稳定的能量。应始终提供新鲜干净的水；考虑使用宠物饮水机以鼓励饮水。内贝隆猫肠胃敏感，因此新食物应逐步引入，过渡期7-10天。避免过量零食和剩饭。欧米伽-3和欧米伽-6脂肪酸（来自鱼油或优质猫粮）有助于保持其华丽的被毛。请咨询兽医以获得具体的饮食建议，特别是当您的猫有健康问题时。

livingTips.en: The Nebelung is well-suited for apartment living due to its quiet, gentle nature and moderate activity level. They do not require a yard, but they love vertical space; provide cat trees, shelves, or window perches for climbing and bird-watching. This breed thrives in calm, predictable homes without constant noise or chaos. Nebelungs bond closely with their owners and can be good with respectful, older children who understand their need for gentleness and quiet. They generally get along well with other polite cats and cat-friendly dogs, especially if introduced gradually. However, they may be intimidated by very boisterous pets. Because they are shy, provide plenty of hiding spots (like covered beds or boxes) where they can retreat when overwhelmed. A stable, loving environment with consistent routines will help a Nebelung feel secure and flourish.
livingTips.zh: 内贝隆猫因其安静温和的天性和适中的活动量，非常适合公寓生活。它们不需要院子，但喜欢垂直空间；提供猫爬架、架子或窗台供其攀爬和观鸟。这种猫在安静、可预测、没有持续噪音或混乱的家庭中茁壮成长。内贝隆猫与主人关系密切，能够与尊重它们、理解其需要温和与安静的较大儿童友好相处。它们通常能与其他有礼貌的猫和友善的狗和睦相处，尤其是逐步引入的情况下。然而，它们可能会被过于喧闹的宠物吓到。由于它们害羞，应提供充足的藏身之处（如封闭式猫窝或纸箱），让它们在感到不安时可以躲藏。一个稳定、充满爱意的环境以及一致的日常生活规律，将帮助内贝隆猫感到安全并健康成长。
